steps.t: The Old Guest-house lies in the First Circle, just south of the City Gates. The mysterious woman stands before the Old Guest-house, talking to Bergil.

Lady Raenemel's house is in the Fourth Circle, near the Finding Place. Bergil wants to take you to Lady Raenemel's house.
